title: Amtech B4100 8'' PINCER
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: Strong Construction: Manufactured from drop forged steel for long-lasting strength and durability.
Protective Finish: Black painted coating helps resist rust and wear in regular use.
Precise Grip: Sharp jaws designed for secure gripping when pulling out tacks, nails, and fasteners.
Multi-Purpose Use: Suitable for woodworking, carpentry, DIY, and general household tasks.
Compact Size: 8" (200mm) length provides control and leverage without being bulky.
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Pincer See more
